title: Help Need info on Maris character for fanfic
display_title: Help Need info on Maris character for fanfic
wikitext:
[]: Help (Need info on Mari's character for fanfic)             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Nov 14, 2008 8:36 pm Forgive me if this is the page? to put this topic; but I am working on a fanfic in Fanfiction.net called Moving On Chapter 6, it takes place after 3rd Impact in the series- the thing is I used a pic of Mari I got from danbooru, since it was under a tab for Mayumi; So I thought of adding her to it as well instead, nobody knows anything about her character yet do they, it would help me a lot if somebody could tell me something about her, other than what she looks like. Once again, I apologize if this should be put somewhere else. Im new here. :-[

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Fri Nov 14, 2008 8:43 pm Very new. Unfortunately, I can safely say that no information on Mari's character is availiable yet. I would suggest either developing an original character or waiting for the movie to come out, because if you develop her from scratch without information it will date your fic very shortly when the next movie comes out. I would also work on your typing: I know that if I were to come across a fic written the way your post is, I would gloss right over it and find something else to do. Just a tip.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Nov 14, 2008 9:04 pm Ok. Thanks anyway. I guess I could try to develop my own. They say she's a tsunedre?, forgive me if the spelling is wrong, but you know, "ice princess", type of character. At least in Wiki and other sites ive been to. I can work off of that. Although, I would also have to see the movie to know her interactions and opinions of Shinji for the fic. Its a Shinji Harem- NGE/Tenchi Muyo xover. Regardless, I appreciate your reply and tip.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 14, 2008 9:12 pm I've never heard the claim that Mari is a tsundere before. If there's no source for the claim, like a Newtype article, it's BS.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 15, 2008 2:54 pm How the hell can we call her a tsundere? We haven't even seen her entire face in any appreciable manner and we got her name from an ass-backwards manner in an obscure videogame. Besides, isn't Asuka already the tsundere?

[]:             Quote Post by Rogue Eva Squirrel » Sat Nov 15, 2008 3:03 pm AuraTwilight wrote: How the hell can we call her a tsundere? We haven't even seen her entire face in any appreciable manner and we got her name from an ass-backwards manner in an obscure videogame. Besides, isn't Asuka already the tsundere?
